user_message: Just came out of account health with Tailspin Toys. Turn this into my brief and pull out the asks.

input_artifacts.content:
Meeting: account health Discussion - Tailspin Toys
Date: 2024-01-20
Duration: 45 minutes
Attendees: Steven Wilson (Tailspin Toys), Raj Mehta (Microsoft)

[00:02:00] Steven Wilson (Tailspin Toys): Good morning. I wanted to follow up on account health from our last session.

[00:06:00] Steven Wilson (Tailspin Toys): Let me add some context -- we've been working on partner engagement and found that the migration can proceed in phases to reduce risk.

[00:11:00] Steven Wilson (Tailspin Toys): I agree with that assessment. From our side, the main concern is timeline constraints.

[00:15:00] Steven Wilson (Tailspin Toys): Let me add some context -- we've been working on cost optimization and found that the existing infrastructure won't support the target workload without upgrades.

[00:17:00] Steven Wilson (Tailspin Toys): I agree with that assessment. From our side, the main concern is timeline constraints.

[00:20:00] Raj Mehta (Microsoft): I agree with that assessment. From our side, the main concern is security compliance.

[00:22:00] Steven Wilson (Tailspin Toys): On the account health front, we've made progress but there are still blockers around vendor dependencies.

handoffs.condition: architecture sketch needed from technical signals

usability_anchors: Score 5: Perfect execution of the golden-path workflow with all artifacts complete and actionable
Score 3: Core output correct but missing polish or one secondary artifact
Score 1: Fails to produce expected output for a clean, unambiguous request
evidence_anchors: Score 5: All evidence correctly sourced and attributed; no hallucination
Score 3: Minor attribution gap but no fabrication
Score 1: Evidence fabricated or significantly misattributed
decision_anchors: Score 5: All decisions correct for this straightforward scenario
Score 3: Primary decision correct; minor secondary issue
Score 1: Primary decision wrong despite clear inputs

guardrail_checks: Clean golden-path scenario -- all guardrails should pass trivially
Must not over-complicate a straightforward request
